name: novaqueue
description: NovaCore Systems - Distributed Job Processing Platform | Built with ❤️ by CaptainCode
author: CaptainCode

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w services/api" "npm run dev -w services/worker" "npm run dev -w services/scheduler" "npm run dev -w services/dashboard"
scripts.build: npm run build -w services/api && npm run build -w services/worker && npm run build -w services/scheduler && npm run build -w services/dashboard
scripts.test: npm run test -w services/api && npm run test -w services/worker

comment: Built with ❤️ by CaptainCode - NovaCore Systems
